_doc: Repo-specific config for the generic burst-bug-hunter skill (Vela). Paths are resolved relative to this file's directory. The skill's driver-server.mjs reads readyExpr/resetExpr/initScript/viewport; the rest is documentation for the caller.
notes: render-offline.js exposes window.__velaReset (in-memory remount, no reload) and window.__velaBooted. burst-init.js installs an in-mem window.storage polyfill so the save-status path is exercisable offline.
